evidence_summary: Establish the political weight of the Thark trial and define Dejah Thoris as a character of diplomatic strength. The scene must transition from the cold, intimidating atmosphere of a judgment to a moment of shared emotional resonance between the prisoner an...

Carter observes a trial in the Thark audience chamber. Dejah Thoris defends the Heliumites, arguing for their role in maintaining the atmosphere and pleading for amity. Her words momentarily sway the council, including Tars Tarkas.
From political tension to a moment of profound, fragile empathy.
John Carter observes the trial from a distance within the chamber.
A momentary silence of empathy settles over the council members.
Dejah Thoris delivers a plea for amity and atmospheric maintenance.
